shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch mascot beside local files with a crossed-out cloud, representing Obsidian's local-first positioning.
assets.caption: Hatch mascot beside local files with a crossed-out cloud, representing Obsidian's local-first positioning.
assets.prompt: Obsidian's Local-First Bet | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) sitting at a desk with a large folder labeled "Your Files" in the foreground, and a cloud with a red X behind it. Hatch's expression is calm and certain — this is a considered choice, not a protest. Cream background, no speech bubble. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing toward local storage versus cloud, setting up Obsidian's founding choice.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing toward local storage versus cloud, setting up Obsidian's founding choice.
assets.prompt: Obsidian's Local-First Bet | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing toward a split scene: on one side a glowing cloud (labeled faintly "somewhere else"), on the other a folder sitting on a desk (labeled faintly "right here"). Hatch is pointing at the folder side. Cream background, no copy beyond the two faint labels. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.prompt: Obsidian's Local-First Bet | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, looking at a simplified diagram: a plain text file labeled "note.md" with arrows leading to three destinations — "any text editor," "any other notes app," and "Obsidian." The three arrows are equal weight. Hatch is tracing the arrows with a finger. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.alt: Hatch in coaching pose with a faint image of a developer user — the specific audience Obsidian targeted.
assets.caption: Hatch in coaching pose with a faint image of a developer user — the specific audience Obsidian targeted.
assets.prompt: Obsidian's Local-First Bet | lesson-frame: Hatch in coaching pose, calm and slightly turned toward the viewer, on a cream background. Behind Hatch, a very faint silhouette of a specific kind of user: a developer at a desk with files open. The image communicates: this product knows exactly who it is for. No speech bubble, no copy. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
